Text.text: By accessing or using the SRS-LMA portal, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not access or use the application.

We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access LMA services. You agree not to copy, reverse-engineer, exploit database endpoints, distribute metadata fields, or bypass role access matrices.

You are responsible for safeguarding your email and password credentials. System administrators have full authority to revoke refresh tokens, toggle organization status, reset session versions, and put organizations into maintenance mode.

In no event shall Saptarishi Solutions or its partners be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of your access or inability to access the lead pipeline.
